trending_videos.title: Moana | "Official Trailer" | In Theaters July 10
trending_videos.description:
The ocean chose her for a reason. 🌊
Experience Disney's #Moana, only in theaters July 10.

In “Moana,” Disney’s live action reimagining of the beloved Oscar®-nominated animated adventure, Moana (Catherine Lagaʻaia) answers the Ocean’s call and, for the first time, voyages beyond the reef of her island of Motunui with the infamous demigod Maui (Dwayne Johnson) on an unforgettable journey to restore prosperity to her people. The film is directed by Emmy® and Tony Award® winner Thomas Kail (“Hamilton”); produced by Dwayne Johnson, Dany Garcia, Beau Flynn, Hiram Garcia and Lin-Manuel Miranda; and executive produced by Kail, Scott Sheldon, Charles Newirth and Auliʻi Cravalho, who voiced Moana in the animated films “Moana” and “Moana 2.” “Moana” features original songs by Lin-Manuel Miranda, Opetaia Foaʻi and Mark Mancina, and an original score composed by Mancina. Audiences can experience the brilliant cinematic sights, sounds and songs of “Moana” exclusively in theaters on July 10, 2026.

trending_videos.title: Second Round: Iowa vs. Florida
trending_videos.description: Iowa faces Florida in the South Region second round at Benchmark International Arena. After a hard-fought battle with the Tigers, Iowa meets the Gators. Florida beat Prairie View 114-55 to qualify. Both teams aim for the tournament's next round.

trending_videos.title: Dutton Ranch | Official Teaser | Paramount+
trending_videos.description:
Rip Wheeler and Beth Dutton gamble everything on a new life in South Texas, but the promise of building a future far from the ghosts of Yellowstone quickly collides with brutal new realities and a rival ranch that will stop at nothing to protect its empire.

Dutton Ranch. Streaming May 15. Only on Paramount+.

trending_videos.title: Second Round: UCLA vs. UConn
trending_videos.description: The East Region round two gets underway as UCLA takes on UConn at Xfinity Mobile Arena. The Bruins beat the Knights 75-71 to qualify, while the Huskies beat Furman 82-71. Both teams look to qualify for the next round in this high-stakes matchup.

trending_videos.title: Apex Legends: Aftershock Event Trailer
trending_videos.description:
Charge into high-voltage combat in the Aftershock Event! Drop into Wildcard and use the new Vortex Shield to block incoming fire and blast enemies with a devastating EMP attack. Power up with new Wild Cards that amp up your shield's offensive and defensive abilities.

Split 2 also drops a new Elite Hemlok with a Silencer and Breach Launcher, new Legend Updates, and more.

Learn more: http://x.ea.com/apxl/aftershock-event

Apex Legends™ is a free-to-play* battle royale game where legendary characters battle for glory, fame, and fortune on the fringes of the Frontier. Play for free now on PlayStation® 4, PlayStation 5, Xbox One, Xbox Series X|S, Nintendo Switch, and PC via EA App, Epic Games Store and Steam: http://x.ea.com/57366.

Check out our YouTube channel: http://x.ea.com/56710.
Follow us on X: https://twitter.com/playapex.
Follow us on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/playapex/.
Follow us on TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@playapex?lang=en

Credits:
Production Company: Electro

trending_videos.title: Hoosiers
trending_videos.description: A college basketball coach (Gene Hackman) leaves the Navy in 1951 and becomes coach of an underdog Indiana high-school team.

trending_videos.title: Marvel Tōkon: Fighting Souls - Amazing Guardians Trailer | PS5 & PC Games
trending_videos.description:
https://www.playstation.com/en-us/games/marvel-tokon-fighting-souls/

Heroes from a new generation, the Amazing Guardians are the second team to be revealed for MARVEL Tōkon: Fighting Souls!

Led by Spider-Man and featuring Ms. Marvel and Star-Lord, this team also introduces a brand-new character: Peni Parker, a brilliant and eccentric young scientist who pilots the powerful SP//dr mech suit and takes on enemies.

Coming to PS5 and PC on August 6th, 2026 PT!
 
© 2026 MARVEL 
©2026 Sony Interactive Entertainment Inc. 
Developed by ARC SYSTEM WORKS CO., LTD.

#ps5 #ps5games #pc #pcgames #marveltokon #xmen

trending_videos.title: Goodyear 400
trending_videos.description: Professional racing's top stars compete for the checkered flag in the annual Goodyear 400. This matchup features tactical pit strategy and high-speed maneuvers on a historic track. A win here cements a driver's legacy at a premier racing venue.

gaming.observation: Significant attention on gaming trailers and updates, reflecting an engaged gaming audience.

Disney.strategic_focus: Leverages known IPs like Moana to generate interest.

TBS.strategic_focus: Focus on sports content, appealing to a dedicated sports audience.

Paramount Plus.strategic_focus: Promotes original content, expanding its streaming service offerings.

TNT.strategic_focus: Sports-related content, aligning with network's sports broadcasting.

Apex Legends.strategic_focus: Regular updates on game events to maintain player engagement.

cross-category expansions.suggestion: Develop crossover content that combines entertainment and sports, such as behind-the-scenes sports documentaries.
Explore interactive content formats for gaming and entertainment, utilizing VR or AR technologies.

niche focus.suggestion: Capitalize on the high engagement of trailers by offering exclusive first-looks or director commentary versions.
Enhance sports content by integrating predictive analytics and real-time data for a more immersive viewer experience.
